---
description: "Re-review the most recently completed feature or phase through the orchestrator."
agent: orchestrator
---

Identify the most recently completed plan item from PLAN.md and .ai/state.json.

Run the reviewer workflow again against that completed item. If the reviewer finds issues, open a follow-up path by describing the requested changes, the affected files, and the validation that should be rerun.

Return the review status, findings, risks, and whether a follow-up implementation pass is required.
